title: How to Deploy Your Claude Automations (3 Methods)
summary: Video tutorial on deploying Claude Code automations using three methods: /loop command for simple cases, scheduled tasks and Claude routines for intermediate scenarios, and Modal or Trigger.dev for production agentic systems. Addresses practical deployment patterns for autonomous agents.
